conservative.name: Shape Plants
conservative.requirements:
5 power
Must be able to touch every plant affected by this spell over the course of casting it; this may require an extended period of time

success.description: You bend the Ghyran flowing through living plants you touch, which allows you to change their shape to suit your purposes. You can mould the fibrous and woody plant materials into tools, barriers, or any other shape that suits your purpose, provided it could be constructed entirely out of plant materials on-hand and doesn't include moving parts

boon.description: 1 item made by this spell is of superior quality

bane.description: Any items made by this spell are of poor quality

delay.description: This spell takes a number of additional actions to cast equal to the number of generated

boon.description: 1 item made by this spell is of superior quality

bane.description: Any items made by this spell are of poor quality

exertion.description: Suffer 1 stress or 1 fatigue (your choice) per generated
